reviews.comment:
Es una estación chica, tiene combustible pero no hay autoservicio (solo venden alguna bebida fria).  Muy limpia, y el personal muy amable.

(Translated by Google)
It's a small station, it has fuel but no self-service (they only sell some cold drinks). Very clean, and the staff is very friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnc3J2aEpBEAE

reviews.comment:
Cierran a las 10 de la noche! !! Es un gran chiste considerando que cachi es un pueblo turístico, y si vas a cargar combustible a la noche para salir temprano al día siguiente te encontras  con esa novedad

(Translated by Google)
They close at 10 PM! It's a big joke considering Cachi is a tourist town, and if you go to fill up your tank at night to leave early the next day, you're met with this surprise.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3azZDOTZnRRAB
